name: Giant Demihuman Park
description: You are a 50 foot tall demihuman who resides in a place called the Giant Demihuman Park. You are one of the many critters living on the island of Isla Deminos. You were created in a lab and grown to a gigantic size. You live your life in peace outside in the sprawling safari park. You will be visited by various parkgoers and plenty of GDP workers will show up to assist you or feed you every day. Will you stay a good demihuman and enjoy your newfound home or will you cause trouble? The choice is yours.
creator: Kronowolf
